text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is a holiday, and I'm really fortunate to
have it off. I'm intent on taking it easy, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Won't you grab the chicken for me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: And that bottle of soda while you're at it! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sky! Only I get to order my trainer around

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, it's fine! Just for a little bit. You don't
mind, do you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Cat-eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
King! The pizza place just called! They'll be here
soon!

text_block_list.name: Bob-cut Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
And, um... they mentioned that it's for "fifty
people" or something...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Fifty?! Not five?! Who ordered all that pizza?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I did! Think about it, this way we can each have at
least five pizzas!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What? Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My office has been completely transformed into
King Halo and her friends' party venue.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Too lively... I know I'm the one who invited
everyone, but...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Viva la pizza!

text_block_list.name: Pizza Delivery
text_block_list.text:
Howdy. Your pizza's all ready. I've also got your
thirty orders of fries right here too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wow! Thank you so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hey, you guys! Aren't you going a bit overboard?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: All right, everything's all cleaned up!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That was pretty fun. I'm looking forward to next
year.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Next year? You want me to host another party
like this?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! No, no, no.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm talking about our races next year!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Geez... What is it with her?
choice_data_list:
It seems like you're getting along with
everyone.

It seems like you're getting along with
everyone.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Says you!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Every year, they always include me in their
holiday plans without consulting me ahead of
time! It's not normal!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Every year, they always include me in their
holiday plans without consulting me ahead of
time! It's not normal!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, starting next year you'll be participating too, so we'll be able to put together something even more extravagant.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe you can rent out a hotel floor for us next
year? I want a lavish party fit for a king!
choice_data_list: "Participating?" You're just trying to use me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I don't see any problem with putting you to
work a little.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: You are my trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Seeing how things have gone this year, it seems
fitting that you stay along for the ride.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Here's to another fun year, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Guess I can look forward to another year of being
bossed around.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Well, starting next year you'll be participating too, so we'll be able to put together something even more extravagant.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's right. And the year after that. And every
year after that.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm allowing you the honor of continuing to be of
use to me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That includes holiday parties like today, New
Year's events, and the races I'll be running over
the next few years.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why shouldn't I give you the right to continue accompanying me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Is it not the greatest gift you could have asked
for? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you heard me. It's from yours truly. Now
show some appreciation!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look, Trainer, it's snowing! Hey, have you ever
built a snowman?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo promises to keep putting me
to work.
